## What is LiveAgent?

LiveAgent is a cloud-based customer service platform that centralizes email, live chat, phone, and social media support — including WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, Telegram, and Viber — into a single agent workspace. It combines a ticketing system, live chat widget, built-in call center, and knowledge base under one subscription.

## Who is it for?

LiveAgent serves businesses of all sizes, from small support teams to enterprise operations. It is a particularly good fit for companies that want a comprehensive help desk without paying the enterprise prices of Zendesk or Salesforce Service Cloud. Clients include brands like Hyundai, Oxford, and NASCAR.

## Strengths

- **All-in-one coverage** — ticketing, live chat, call center, knowledge base, and social channels in one platform.
- **Competitive pricing** — plans start at $15/agent/month annually, with introductory discounts for the first six months.
- **No-contract flexibility** — month-to-month billing with no long-term lock-in required.
- **AI assistance** — automated chatbots and AI-powered response suggestions reduce agent workload.
- **Free trial** — full 30-day trial with no credit card needed to evaluate the full feature set.

## What to consider

- Social media channels like WhatsApp and Instagram come as paid add-ons rather than included by default.
- Advanced features are concentrated in higher-tier plans; the entry plan is limited for growing teams.
- The Enterprise plan requires booking a demo rather than self-service signup.

## Bottom line

LiveAgent offers an impressive breadth of customer service functionality at pricing that undercuts most enterprise alternatives. For teams that want email, chat, and phone support managed in one place without a big-budget commitment, it is a strong and practical option.
